zh.Seal, Kent, England: 英國肯特澤亞爾 哈特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Nisell於1447年出生在英國肯特萊坦時，她的父親Lord John Nisell II30歲，母親Lady Joanne Carter22歲。她於1471年與Lord John Theobald IV在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1507年1月19日在英國肯特澤亞爾 哈特享年60歲，埋葬在英國肯特澤亞爾 哈特。

zh-hans.Seal, Kent, England: 英国肯特澤亞爾 哈特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Nisell于1447年出生在英国肯特萊坦时，她的父亲Lord John Nisell II30岁，母亲Lady Joanne Carter22岁。她于1471年与Lord John Theobald IV在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1507年1月19日在英国肯特澤亞爾 哈特享年60岁，埋葬在英国肯特澤亞爾 哈特。

nameMeanings.name: Nisell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: ornamental name composed of an altered form of the placename element vi (representing either Old Norse vithr ‘forest’ or vé ‘sacred place’) + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius, with intrusive -s- for euphony.
ornamental name from placenames beginning with Vis- (of many possible origins) + the suffix -ell.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Nisell was born in 1447, in Wrotham, Kent, England, her father, Lord John Nisell II, was 30 and her mother, Lady Joanne Carter, was 22. She married Lord John Theobald IV in 1471, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 19 January 1507, in Seal Chart, Kent, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Seal Chart, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Nisell est née en 1447, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Lord John Nisell II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Joanne Carter, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John Theobald IV en 1471, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 janvier 1507, à Seal Chart, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Seal Chart, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Nisell 1447 in Wrotham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord John Nisell II 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Joanne Carter 22. Sie hat 1471 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Lord John Theobald IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Januar 1507 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Seal Chart, Kent, England und wurde in Seal Chart, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Nisell è nata il nel 1447 nel Wrotham, Kent, England, sua padre, Lord John Nisell II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Joanne Carter, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Lord John Theobald IV nel 1471, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 gennaio 1507, nel Seal Chart, Kent, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Seal Chart, Kent, England.

ja.Wrotham, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントウロサム
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Nisellが1447年にイギリスケントウロサムで生まれた時，父Lord John Nisell IIは30歳，母Lady Joanne Carterは22歳であった。1471年にイギリスイギリスケントでLord John Theobald IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1507年1月19日にイギリスケントセアル チャートで60歳で死去し，イギリスケントセアル チャートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Nisell(이)가 1447년 영국 켄트 로섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord John Nisell II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joanne Carter(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Lord John Theobald IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 1월 19일 영국 켄트 시 처트에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 시 처트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Nisell nasceu em 1447, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John Nisell II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joanne Carter, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John Theobald IV em 1471, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1507, em Seal Chart, Kent, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Seal Chart, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Nisell родилась в 1447 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord John Nisell II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanne Carter, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Theobald IV в 1471 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 19 января 1507 г. в местности силь чарт, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности силь чарт, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan Nisell nació en 1447, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John Nisell II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Joanne Carter, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lord John Theobald IV en 1471, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de enero de 1507, en Seal Chart, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Seal Chart, Kent, Inglaterra.
